mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
